div1.entryFree: Type, distinguishing mark, sign, badge: so (loyal) am I now: O no, that cannot be; of that true t. hath Tarquin rifled me, Lucr. 1050. thy father bears the t. of king of Naples, H6C I, 4, 121 (i. e. the crown). the high imperial t. of this earth's glory, R3 IV, 4, 244. tall stockings, short blistered breeches, and those --s of travel, H8 I, 3, 31.
